name: Full Swing Golf Inc
about: Full Swing Golf Inc is a technology company specializing in high-end golf simulators and launch monitors. They offer a range of products including the Pro 2.0 Simulator starting at $54,900 and the Sport Series Simulator starting at $44,900, designed for both home and commercial use. The company is known for its patented camera-based simulator technology and is trusted by professional golfers like Tiger Woods, Jon Rahm, and Jordan Spieth. Full Swing also provides various software options, including golf, multisport, and a new Skill Strike application, catering to different user needs and spaces.
why_golfers_like_it: Patented camera-based technology for high accuracy
Trusted by top professional golfers like Tiger Woods
Comprehensive software suite including golf and multisport options
Offers both high-end and more budget-friendly simulator models
Proven performance in homes and commercial spaces worldwide

faq.answer: The website does not mention food and drink policies, as the venue type is not a sim bar or restaurant.

faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes on a simulator.
